author: alexkurowski
description: Helpful tools for playing TTRPG games, geared towards solo play with a GM emulator.

manifest.author: Alex Kurowski
manifest.description: Random generator tools geared towards solo TTRPG gameplay
manifest.name: Solo RPG Toolkit

name: Solo RPG Toolkit

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- A fix for inline fudge dice
- Allow hiding custom table tabs/buttons with an underscore at the end in file/folder name

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Add inline dice with advantage/disadvantage option using `` `2d6/a` `` or `` `2d6/d` `` (huge thanks to @jakub-wojciech!)
- Add option to make progress boxes uniform, and not mark every 5th box with a different color

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Trying out a workaround for rendering inline elements inside tables and callouts

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fix blank "template" property

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Add template prefix option in order to be able to ignore frontmatter keys
- Update button text that's shown when default deck files are missing

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Add support of double-sided cards (ex: `cardname.jpg` and `cardname_back.jpg`)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Add shape option to inline boxes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Render markdown in random table results

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix inline counters in reading mode

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Bug fix

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Add fudge dice (inline ``dF``)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Large update to inline elements
  - Add inline counter with max value (`2/6`)
  - Add right-click context menu
  - Allow setting individual size and color (`boxes|red|60: 0/10`)
- Add support for weighted templates (add ` ^X` to the template key)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fix clipboard values when "remove dice roll" option is enabled

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Update default decks to be exported into the vault, for Excalidraw plugin compatibility

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Reorganize settings tab
- Add option to remove dice roll on click

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Bug fixes
- Inline dice

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added ability to roll on files instead of file content
- Added ability to hide certain custom table folders from dropdown

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Improve full subfolder references
- Fix newlines in templates

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added ability to reference all notes at once from a custom table subfolder by using `{folder_name}` in a template.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Additional oracle

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added quick custom table for throw-away rolls

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added real world character names to the mix

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minor experimental release

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added cut-up method support

To use it, copy-paste a book or other source material into a custom table note, and add `mode: cutup` property.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minor adjustments for the default YN oracle.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added bell curve probability for custom tables

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added support for inline elements in reading view

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed card rotation on windows

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Updated default decks, so they can be copy-pasted into notes as markdown links

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Allow PNG copy-paste of default decks

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minor update

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added shift/long tap to inline counter elements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added more character traits and improved inline elements usability.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added clocks for progress tracking.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added an option for default decks flip

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minor fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added option for dice result format
- Fixed a bug when long press on dice button would result in double press on mobile
- Fixed a bug where settings sometimes didn't take effect

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added long press and right click to dice roller to substitute the shift key holding

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added ability to copy dice roll results. Hold shift to copy the whole pull.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added more oracle variants
- Save current open tab between sessions

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Decks no longer re-shuffle when you switch between tools.
- It's now possible to refer to multiple sections with custom templates via `{section1 | section2}`.
- It's now possible to use keywords inside sections (Known bug: using nested keywords while referring to a section from another note will fail to find the correct section).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added different options for "click to copy" on deck cards, and added more image formats support (thank you @mProjectsCode!)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed solo-rpg-toolkit.zip for manual installation

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minor fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Add custom deck config support

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added 50% chance of a flipped card (only default decks for now). And an experimental "click to copy" option for cards.

releases.description: Fixed quotation marks in templates properly this time, and added a setting for oracle language

releases.description: Added categories for random tables. It's now possible to create custom categories by placing your tables in subfolders in your Table folder.
